case_title: SOPHIA MA VS. DAVID BOUPFARD et al

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, SOPHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUPFARD, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 5/14/03. $11,873.48 RENT, $576.13 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,449.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
